case_title: PRIETO, CESAR C/O INST/LABORAL DE LA RAZA VS PALMER, JANICE

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO NOV-06-2000 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRIETO, CESAR C/O INST/LABORAL DE LA RAZA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALMER, JANICE $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $548.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLTF'S PROCESS SERVER REQUEST FOR A RESET FILED.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PALMER, JANICE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-18-2000, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO JAN-02-2001 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 NEED MORE TIME TO PREPARE COUNTER CLAIM & SERVE PLAINTIFF IN PROPER TIME.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT PALMER, JANICE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT PRIETO, CESAR C/O INST/LABORAL DE LA RAZA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-28-2000, OFF CALENDAR
